name: Kaufland
summary: Sell on Kaufland and keep your stock in sync in real time. Conquer the German market without any extra work.
tagline: Easily process your Kaufland orders with your preferred carrier straight from ShopLinkr
about: Kaufland is a large German company focused on both online and offline retail. Through its online platform, Kaufland offers a wide range of products, such as electronics, clothing, toys, and household goods. The platform works as a marketplace where third-party sellers can offer their products to a broad audience. Kaufland focuses on user-friendly services, fast delivery, and a large product range, which makes it an important player in the online retail sector in Europe.

faqs.q: Can I connect all countries to ShopLinkr?
faqs.a: Yes, you can connect all countries to ShopLinkr. When you set up the Kaufland connection, you select the country you want for that sales channel. Each sales channel is linked to one country. So you connect Kaufland again for every additional country you want to link to ShopLinkr.
